properties.displayName: Suspicious File and Directory Search Commands
properties.description: Detects suspicious file and directory enumeration commands often used by attackers
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\cmd.exe" or Image|endswith has "\dir.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "dir /s" or CommandLine|contains has "dir /a" or CommandLine|contains has "dir /b" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.txt" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.doc" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.pdf" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.xls" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *.ppt" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *password*" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *config*" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *secret*" or CommandLine|contains has "dir *backup*") and Image endswith "\where.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "where /r" or CommandLine|contains has "where *.exe" or CommandLine|contains has "where *.bat" or CommandLine|contains has "where *.ps1") and (Image|endswith has "\findstr.exe" or Image|endswith has "\find.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "/s" or CommandLine|contains has "/i password" or CommandLine|contains has "/i admin" or CommandLine|contains has "/i login" or CommandLine|contains has "/i secret" or CommandLine|contains has "/i key") and Image endswith "\powershell.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "Get-ChildItem -Recurse" or CommandLine|contains has "gci -r" or CommandLine|contains has "ls -r" or CommandLine|contains has "dir -r" or CommandLine|contains has "Select-String" or CommandLine|contains has "Get-Content | Select-String") and (CommandLine|contains has "C:\Users" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Windows\System32" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\Program Files" or CommandLine|contains has "C:\ProgramData" or CommandLine|contains has "%USERPROFILE%" or CommandLine|contains has "%APPDATA%")
